text: Reveal had no video content, no content marketing, and no content team. Their sales team was closing deals in 60 days with zero marketing air cover, relying entirely on outbound and word of mouth.
path: div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > div.a2cs-block-label.a2cs-after

text: Sales reps started sending videos directly to prospects. Buyers were showing up to calls already educated from LinkedIn. The sales cycle compressed by 40%, and video-attributed deals closed $600K in revenue over 1.5 years.
path: div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-story > div.a2cs-block > p
div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label > span.a2cs-icon

text: The Video Engine (in collaboration with PartnerHacker)
path: div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-built > div.a2cs-built-label

text: We stood up Reveal's entire content engine from scratch. We built out their video marketing strategy from TOFU to BOFU. Created 100+ videos across the full spectrum: LinkedIn thought leadership, YouTube education, outbound sales enablement, top-of-funnel comedy, webinars, and more. We also helped promote and produce the Nearbound Summit, a 7,000-person virtual summit that generated pipeline and put Reveal at the center of the partner-led growth conversation.
path: div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-built > p
div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-outcome
div#panel-reveal > div.a2cs-outcome > strong

text: . Their marketing engine helped make it happen.
